title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Track down every able-bodied young man you can...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...and bring them here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Argh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This entire country will become our weapons factory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait! Please don't take him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DADDY!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who do you think you're mouthin' off to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why has the river gone dark?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's no more drinking water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The crops won't grow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...and there's nothing left to eat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If you can still breathe,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You can still work!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Keep your hands moving, you scum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The borders...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...are stayin' closed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't count on any miracles coming to save you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to be patient... it will be a long winter...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we have to believe in Toki-SAMA's words.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look at these gluttonous fools, Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They actually ate the leftovers of the defective smile fruits!! Gufuhaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's it! Let's have the rest of ebieu town follow suit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their bellies will stay empty, and their loved ones will continue to keel over...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they won't be able to do anything except grin brightly! They'll never stop laughing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: AHAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the perfect fate for this country's pests!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Gufuha Hahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: COUGH HERE... CURSE YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Gufuhaha!! I'm taking you with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You shouldn't have understand the wrath of the Kurozumi clan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ahhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll be seeing you in hell...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We can drink together down there!! Buhahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems things are getting out of hand here..

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
